steps.title: Recall the triangle area formula
steps.content:
The area of a triangle is given by:

$$A = \frac{1}{2} \times \text{base} \times \text{height}$$

We are given base = 4 inches and height = 17 inches.

steps.title: Substitute and calculate
steps.content:
Substitute the values into the formula:

$$A = \frac{1}{2} \times 4 \times 17$$

Simplify:

$$A = 2 \times 17 = 34$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
